THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. CASE SETTLED. VISITING JUDGE CINDEE MAYFIELD. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF LENA STRANGIO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ROSS DRESS FOR LESS, INC. IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF APPEARED IN COURT AND STATED THAT BOTH PARTIES HAVE SETTLED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-13-2026 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO FEB-27-2026 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF LENA STRANGIO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ROSS DRESS FOR LESS, INC IS NOT PRESENT. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IS PENDING. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE. IF NO APPEARANCES AT THE NEXT HEARING THIS MATTER IS TO BE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE, PER PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: XXXXXXXX; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF STRANGIO, LENA
ORDER TO CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT: PENDING SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT.
